title: All-Party Parliamentary Group on Polyendocrine Metabolic Ovarian Syndrome (PMOS/PCOS)
purpose: To drive change by raising awareness of Polyendocrine Metabolic Ovarian Syndrome (PMOS, formerly PCOS) amongst parliamentarians, policy-makers and the public, to increase recognition of PMOS as a complex, lifelong condition, generating policy solutions to improve the lives of those living with PMOS.

contact_details.registered_contact_address: House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA. Tel: 020 7219 7704.
contact_details.public_enquiry_point_name: Josie Curtis, Healthcomms Consulting Ltd (part of the PLMR Group)
